data.content: The project uses **MSTest v3.8.0** with the Microsoft Testing Platform enabled. Integration tests are tagged with `[TestCategory("Integration")]`. Let me run them.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests filtered by category

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests filtered by category

data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) with the Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` is enabled in `Directory.Build.props`). The integration tests are marked with `[TestCategory("Integration")]`.

Let me run the integration tests filtered by category.

arguments.description: Run integration tests filtered by category

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-9bad2544539d44f6b8c5f9627ccf562b && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests filtered by category", "initial_wait": 60}
